x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist applies a dedicated Major Incident summarization template when major_incident_state is set. Low population means most P1/P2 incidents get generic AI summaries instead of richer executive-ready format.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure the Major Incident State field is set on all P1 incidents and on P2 incidents that are formally declared as major incidents. Configure automation or a mandatory UI policy on P1 closure to enforce this. Now Assist applies a dedicated MI summarization template only when major_incident_state is populated.
